name: multi-duck
description: Convene a panel of independent rubber-duck reviewers over your in-flight work (a diff, PR, plan, tests, or commentable HTML plans with their open comments), each on a different model so their blind spots do not overlap, all in parallel, then consolidate the findings and autonomously apply the safe fixes. Two modes: prisms for wide coverage, consensus for cross-model agreement. Works on Claude Code and the GitHub Copilot CLI.
